title: VS Hyperdrives[ABANDONNED]
description: This project is a little mod that add Hyperdrives to Valkyrien skies
body:
![VS Hyperdrives Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1ab5f91565a09e811e026c9a02fa0483400ca35.png)

WARNING: This mod has been abandonned and may break with new VS2 Versions! You can then find alternatives using mods like Genesis!
Welcome to VS Hyperdrives, a small addon mod to Valkyrien skies that add Possibility to jump to specifiate coordinates, here is a review of features:

- Hyperdrive[Creative Only]
- Quantum, the jump drive survival friendly
- Quantonium, a new ore with special quantics properties...
- Quantum Tube, an item required to craft and active Quantum

  
![Block & items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00a71168d1e84bb5bd8b2eafc52871231b0a01cc.png)

Crafts;
![craft qt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b12108db8366afbefaf7a53d4508981844673c06.png)

![craft qtnium tube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70cbc1263365e17faa55efd20ab40122ffbddeef.png)

</details>
